customManagers.description: Container image repository+tag pairs in bjw-s app-template HelmReleases

packageRules.description: Gateway API CRDs are only as usable as the controller that reads them. Cilium 1.19.6 (latest) documents support for Gateway API v1.4.1 and builds against v1.4.0-rc.2; we already run v1.5.1, one minor ahead. Hold at 1.5.x until Cilium declares support for a newer bundle — see design/docs/networking.md.
Major Docker image bumps — labeled for manual review; image-scan workflow adds a breaking-change warning to the PR comment
Immich server and ML must always share the same version tag
Zitadel and zitadel-login must always share the same version tag
Immich postgres uses a composite version string Renovate cannot parse — skip it
Skip floating 'latest' tags — no meaningful version to track
Pin GitHub Actions to patch level (digest pinning skipped per project policy)
